cases.prompt: Initialize my private remek skills source and show the plan first.
Create this skill with remek and install it afterward.
Revise this skill in my governed source without losing its base.
Record remek evidence and approval from these reviewed external results.
Prepare and verify this approved remek mirror before I push it.
Audit this untrusted skill with remek without executing it.
Install a third-party Agent Skill for my coding agent.
Write or improve an Agent Skill from my rough idea.
Run this skill against Claude and Codex and grade the transcripts.
Push this repository, make it public, tag it, and publish a release.
Rewrite history and cut a release of this ordinary Python package.
Update every teammate's installed copy of our shared skills.
